phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale per il museo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh per eel moo-ZEH-oh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, around the corner.

responses.english: At the main entrance, around the corner.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è necessaria la prenotazione per entrare oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, eh neh-ches-SAHR-ee-ah lah preh-noh-tah-TSYOH-neh per en-TRAH-reh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Bisogna prenotare online prima di venire.
likely_response.pronunciation: bee-SOHJ-nah preh-noh-TAH-reh ohn-LEE-neh PREE-mah DEE veh-NEE-reh
likely_response.translation_en: You must book online before coming.

responses.english: You must book online before coming.
responses.phonetic: bee-SOHJ-nah preh-noh-TAH-reh ohn-LEE-neh PREE-mah DEE veh-NEE-reh
responses.french: Bisogna prenotare online prima di venire.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto d'ingresso, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah eel bee-LYET-toh ding-GRES-so, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the automatic ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the automatic ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è permesso fare foto nelle mostre, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, eh per-MES-soh FAH-reh FOH-toh nel-leh MOH-streh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Solo senza flash nelle aree comuni.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOH-loh SEHN-tsah FLAHS NEHL-leh ah-REH-eh koh-MOO-nee
likely_response.translation_en: Only without flash in common areas.

responses.english: Only without flash in common areas.
responses.phonetic: SOH-loh SEHN-tsah FLAHS NEHL-leh ah-REH-eh koh-MOO-nee
responses.french: Solo senza flash nelle aree comuni.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove posso ritirare i biglietti già prenotati, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh POS-soh ree-tee-RAH-reh ee bee-LYET-tee jah preh-noh-TAH-tee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the automatic machines at the entrance.

responses.english: At the automatic machines at the entrance.
